Video.summary: A woman tells her bounty-hunter husband that she is cheating with a stripper, who turns out to be gay; a woman finds out about her boyfriend's secret lover.
Video.title: A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper

Image.alt: A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper
A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper
A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper

Video.summary: Clint wants his wife's girlfriend, Anna, to back off! Next Kelly's husband pleads with her to take him back. But Kelly's mind is made up, she's staying with her husband's brother!
Video.title: Ex-lovers Return!

Video.summary: Mehren says everything would be just great with her boyfriend, John, if only his wife would leave them alone! Next Greg is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating with her best friend, Yolanda!
Video.title: I Admit ... I'm Cheating

Video.summary: A man wants to get back with his ex-girlfriend; a woman seeks to end two relationships; a man tries to save his marriage.
Video.title: Bring It, Bro!

Video.summary: A woman discovers her man has been cheating with various women; a woman suspects her husband is cheating with their roommate.
Video.title: Jerry's Talk Show Host Special

Video.summary: Mary Jane has a secret to reveal to George. For the past 6 months, she''s been cheating on him with a woman! Then, Tanya reveals to her husband that she’s in love with Sheri!
Video.title: Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover

Image.alt: Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover
Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover
Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover

Video.summary: Colby says he stays with Brentnie only for the sake of the children; Melissa's brother catches her kissing a man and tells the man's girlfriend; Sam wants to win back his girlfriend but learns that she has found someone else.
Video.title: Men Acting Fishy

Video.summary: Jazzy wants a threesome with her best friend and her boyfriend; Danielle's baby daddy hooked up with her good friend; Marra's big secret explodes in his face.
Video.title: Love Predictions ... Threesomes

Video.summary: Diamynn admits to hooking up with a man who has a girlfriend and a child; Angel regrets kissing Brittany and does not want to rekindle a relationship with her; Kaitlyn says her husband's floundering wrestling career is hard on their family.
Video.title: Baby, I'm Weak

Video.summary: Kevin is settling down with Ashley, but his baby mama Sandra won’t just take it! Gena lied about her pregnancy to stay married to Rico, but now Rico is the liar! He’s coming clean about cheating with Shamika!
Video.title: A Woman's Wrath

Video.summary: Katrina says that her emotional needs are not being met, so she started cheating with Michaell, a drag queen. Then John explains to his girlfriend that he has recently acquired a female "indentured servant."
Video.title: Stunning Secrets Revealed!

Video.summary: A woman has sex with her sister and brother-in-law; a husband finds another lover; a stripper pretends to be a cocktail waitress; transvestite prostitute.
Video.title: Threesomes With My Sister

Video.summary: Nick's girlfriend finds out why he spends so much time with their neighbor; Osha's boyfriend scored with his female friend; Brandi resents her boyfriend's reckless behavior after all of the sacrifices she has made to keep their relationship.
Video.title: Clingy Chicks

Video.summary: Rashelle's here to find out how close Jessica and Richard have really become. Then, Sean says that his dream is to marry his fiancee Jessica by the lake. But before the couple takes the plunge, he's got to get some secrets off of his chest
Video.title: Big Blow Offs

Video.summary: Cooda's tells his girlfriend that their relationship is over because he's gay and he's running off with a male lover! Then Kathy has always been fond of sharing with best friend Cindy, but that never included Cindy's husband Marquis!
Video.title: You Cheated...So Beat It

Video.summary: Steve helps a pregnant prostitute change her lifestyle.
Video.title: Update: Steve & The Pregnant Hooker

Video.summary: Jewels says her new lover, Alexia, is exactly what she needs in her life and Jewels is going home with her today! Next Kim and Mary have been fooling Kim's girlfriend! They told her that Mary was Kim's cousin when in reality they are lovers!
Video.title: Lesbians, Lesbians, Lesbians!

Video.summary: After their sex life hit the dumps, Andrew searched for satisfaction and found it with his girlfriends sister! Then Desi will do anything to keep Melissa from leaving her behind, but sleeping with her cousin was not something she planned on!
Video.title: Your Sister Gave It Up!

Video.summary: Nikki finally has proof of Bryan’s trysts with Melissa! Lil Ron slept with two cousins Felisha and Simone. Drew has admitted to cheating 15 times, but his latest hookup with neighbor Shaina could be his last.
Video.title: More Mistress Mayhem

Video.summary: Darleen's husband says he is addicted to strip clubs; Mary's boyfriend is obsessed with cleaning his car, and she suspects he is using it as cover for something else; Jesse's fear of commitment lands him in hot water.
Video.title: I Cheated With Three Strippers

Video.summary: Have you ever risked your relationship by revealing a secret? Have you questioned your lovers trust? Today's guests say they are tired of broken promises and they are here to face the truth and fight for their lovers.
Video.title: Lovers Do Battle

Video.summary: Ariana's friend wants her to dump her boyfriend for him; Samantha goes on strike because she fears that her boyfriend is cheating.
Video.title: Love Sick

Video.summary: Latoia suspects that her male-stripper boyfriend, Hurricane, is gay; Savannah thinks Windy has caused a divide in her relationship with her boyfriend; Taylor wants her one-night stand with Cowboy to turn into a long-term relationship.
Video.title: Is My Stripper Boyfriend Gay?

Video.summary: Insecure Star likes Deandre, but he prefers her stripper cousin; Dominic has a confession to make to his girlfriend; Kristin cheats with her husband's teenage nephew.
Video.title: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Image.alt: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Video.summary: Kenny hooked up with a woman who is pressing him for a relationship, but he has a surprise for her; possessive Kelsey confronts her boyfriend and the woman with whom he hooked up at a house party; Jeremy wants to end his relationship.
Video.title: I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew

Image.alt: I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew
I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew
I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew

Video.summary: Pregnant Heather will not stand for her boyfriend's cheating, particularly since he's sleeping with his niece! Next Cindy is in a predicament: the man she loves doesn't want her anymore and another whom she doesn't love is begging to be with her!
Video.title: I'm Sleeping With My Uncle

Video.summary: Eddie has been with his girlfriend for 3 years but he wants to tell her that he has been sleeping with a man for the last 5 months of their relationship.
Video.title: Heartless Homewreckers

Video.summary: Unemployed Sebastian has been badgering his girlfriend, Dee, for months to become a stripper and star in adult films. Later Steve tells his girlfriend that he's secretly been videotaping their sex sessions and broadcasting them over the Internet!
Video.title: My Secret Will Shock You!

Video.summary: Strippers Precious and Jewels have too much in common; John learns that his friend is responsible for the downturn in his marriage; DJ's girlfriend wants to see other people.
Video.title: She Took My Man ... and My Car!

Image.alt: She Took My Man ... and My Car!
She Took My Man ... and My Car!
She Took My Man ... and My Car!

Video.summary: Johnny's family hates his wife and his sister is here today to destroy his marriage. But, Johnny's wife isn't going quietly! Next Mitchell is here to confront his boyfriend about his boyfriend's decision to become a woman!
Video.title: The Springer Showdown

Video.summary: Stripper Brittany confronts a co-worker who hooked up with one of Brittany's clients; Bebo's baby-mama confesses to sleeping with his best friend; three guests provide a surprise.
Video.title: Battle Royale With Cheese

Video.summary: Arvonda says her fiance can't satisfy her and treats her badly. She'll tell him that she's been sleeping with his best friend, Mike! Next When Teresa's boyfriend asked her to have a threesome, she had no idea he was having an ongoing affair!
Video.title: Leave It To Springer!

Video.summary: Selina recently met Lee at the mall and while their love has blossomed, she's got a serious secret - she's really a man! Then D's visits to the local pool have gotten him into hot water after sleeping with the lifeguard.
Video.title: Transsexual Takedown
